hero.subtitle: Ground handling, cargo, general aviation, and premium solutions across 6 countries and 60+ airports worldwide.

services.label: Services
services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Flawless solutions at every point of aviation.

items.title: Ground Handling
items.desc: Aircraft, passenger and baggage operations, apron services and ground equipment support.

items.title: Cargo & Logistics
items.desc: Air cargo warehousing, handling and international logistics solutions.

items.title: General Aviation
items.desc: Comprehensive FBO services for private aircraft, helicopter and VIP operations.

items.title: Lounge & Platinum
items.desc: Premium passenger experience and VIP lounges at the world's finest airports.

items.title: Technical Services
items.desc: Aircraft maintenance, repair and overhaul services with technical support.

statsHero.desc: Operating in 6 countries since 1958, Celebi Aviation sets world standards with ground handling, cargo, general aviation and VIP lounge solutions.

about.label: About Us
about.desc: Since 1958, Celebi has been at the heart of aviation, setting industry standards with world-class service quality. Combining courage and pragmatism, we make a difference at every airport.

contact.label: Contact
contact.desc: We are available for questions, feedback, or collaboration opportunities. Let us know how we can help.
